description: Deterministic portfolio governance thresholds for trim, stop-loss, restructure, position sizing, and sector concentration checks.

checks.name: Trim Oversized Winners
checks.description: Positions exceeding max single-name weight should be trimmed back to target.

checks.name: Stop-Loss Review
checks.description: Holdings down more than threshold from entry or recent high trigger a mandatory review (not auto-sell).

checks.name: Restructure / Thesis Drift
checks.description: Fundamental thesis breakdown - moat erosion, management change, secular shift, or capital allocation failure.

checks.name: Position Sizing Discipline
checks.description: New entries must respect conviction-tier sizing; no position below min or above max for its tier.

checks.name: Sector Concentration Limit
checks.description: Aggregate sector exposure should not exceed limit; diversifies away idiosyncratic sector risk.
